message:
feat: major ufunc rewrite with expanded dtype, I/O, linalg, and random coverage

Comprehensive expansion of the NumPy-compatible numerical computing
implementation across five crates:

Universal functions (fnp-ufunc — 11k+ lines restructured):
- Complete rewrite of the ufunc dispatch system for better type
  promotion, broadcasting, and output dtype inference
- Expand element-wise operations with full NumPy-compatible casting
  rules (safe/same_kind/unsafe) and promotion hierarchy
- Add reduction ufuncs (add.reduce, multiply.reduce, maximum.reduce,
  minimum.reduce) with axis, keepdims, and initial value support
- Add accumulate operations (add.accumulate, multiply.accumulate)
- Add outer product operations (add.outer, multiply.outer)
- Improve error messages for shape mismatch and dtype incompatibility

Data types (fnp-dtype):
- Expand dtype system with structured dtypes (named fields, offsets,
  itemsize calculation)
- Add datetime64/timedelta64 dtype support with unit resolution
  tracking (ns, us, ms, s, m, h, D, W, M, Y)
- Improve dtype string parsing for NumPy-compatible dtype descriptors
- Add byteorder handling for cross-platform compatibility

I/O (fnp-io):
- Expand text file parsing with delimiter auto-detection, comment
  stripping, header/skiprows/max_rows control
- Add binary format support (fromfile/tofile with dtype-aware
  read/write)
- Add NPY/NPZ format parsing and writing for NumPy native interchange
- Update conformance oracle outputs for expanded test coverage (29
  total I/O cases, all passing)

Linear algebra (fnp-linalg):
- Add matrix decomposition operations (LU, Cholesky, QR, SVD,
  eigendecomposition)
- Add matrix operations (det, inv, pinv, matrix_rank, matrix_power,
  norm, cond, slogdet)
- Add linear system solvers (solve, lstsq, tensorsolve)

Random (fnp-random):
- Add PCG64/Philox/SFC64 bit generator backends
- Add distribution sampling: uniform, normal, exponential, poisson,
  binomial, gamma, beta, chi-square, Student-t, Fisher-F
- Add Generator/RandomState API compatibility layer
- Add seed sequence management for reproducible random streams

Conformance:
- Update shape_stride_differential_report.json with 2 new failure
  cases (as_strided negative stride handling) documenting known
  behavioral divergences from NumPy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
